message:
style: clippy and formatting cleanups across four modules

Minor lint-driven improvements from concurrent agent passes:

- src/extension_inclusion.rs: use inline format string for assert message
  ("keys not sorted: {keys:?}"); simplify raw string literals from r## to r#
  in normalized_manifest_hash proptest
- src/extension_index.rs: remove unnecessary .clone() on name in
  score_entry proptest (value is moved, not reused)
- src/model_selector.rs: remove unnecessary .clone() on p2 in
  ModelSelectorOverlay proptest (value consumed by ModelKey constructor)
- tests/extension_validation.rs: replace .ends_with(".git") with
  Path::extension().is_some_and() for more robust suffix detection
  in normalize_github_repo proptest

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
